options.name: -early
options.description: Reports wireload model information for the best case condition

options.name: -inst
options.description: <name_or_collection_of_hierarchical_instances> Reports wireload model information for the specified hierarchical instance(s) only

options.name: -late
options.description: Reports wireload model information in worst-case condition

options.name: -ports
options.description: Reports wireload model information for the specified ports (string, optional) > <filename>[.gz] # writes the report to the specified file name. If the file already exists, the software overwrites it (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename>[.gz] # writes the report to the specified file name. If the file already exists,the software concatenates the report to the end of the file
